Interface TimeDuration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem

ESRI.Server.System.dll

An object that represents a time duration value.

[Guid("953DC994-AA0D-4193-9C1F-469B60D61711")]
public interface TimeDuration : ITimeDuration
